overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an open-world video game showing a character walking through a sunny urban residential neighborhood. The character traverses sidewalks, crosses railroad tracks and street intersections, passing industrial buildings, parked vehicles, and a distinctive church structure while light traffic moves through the streets.

events.description: white sports car drives past on the right side of the street
character steps onto railroad crossing tracks and crosses the rails

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to industrial buildings with garage doors

wooden power line poles with multiple cross-arms lining the street
large commercial billboard structure visible in the distance
railroad crossing X-sign with red and white stripes and signal lights
low-rise commercial structures with flat roofs across the street

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on an industrial sidewalk with garage buildings on the left. The character walks forward as a white sports car passes by on the right, then approaches and crosses a railroad crossing with X-shaped warning signals. The environment is sunny and clear with sparse vegetation.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sidewalk past a white tiled building, encountering a pedestrian standing near the wall. The character continues past a parked delivery truck that occupies part of the sidewalk. In the distance, a church with a distinctive triangular roof becomes visible while utility poles shift to the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with traffic signals and crosswalks

events.description: character steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the multi-lane intersection
blue sedan and other vehicles pass through the intersection as the character crosses

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide street intersection, navigating between passing vehicles while heading toward the opposite sidewalk

person in brown jacket walking across the street from the opposite direction

entered.detail: overhead traffic light poles with horizontal signal arms showing red lights
wide asphalt intersection with painted crosswalk lines and manhole covers
white wooden fence along the edge of residential properties

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a major intersection with traffic signals and a prominent church building on the left. After waiting for traffic, the character crosses the wide asphalt intersection as cars pass by. A pedestrian in a brown jacket crosses from the opposite direction, and residential houses with white fences become visible on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with church and single-family homes

events.description: character turns slightly right to follow the sidewalk curve past the church

agents.ego_description: walking along the residential sidewalk past the church property and continuing down the tree-lined street

entered.detail: single-story homes with varied architecture and front yards

segments.scene_description: The character continues along a residential sidewalk with the church building now receding into the background on the left. White picket fences line the right side along with single-story houses. The street is quieter with fewer vehicles, and mature trees provide moderate shade along the sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunny urban environment that transitions from an industrial zone into a quiet residential neighborhood. It begins on an industrial sidewalk beside garage buildings, moving forward as a white sports car passes by before the character crosses a railroad crossing marked by X-shaped warning signals. As the path continues, the scene shifts past a white tiled building and a parked delivery truck, while a distinctive triangular church roof emerges in the distance and utility poles migrate to the right of the frame. The camera then approaches a major intersection where the character waits for traffic before crossing the wide asphalt street, passing a pedestrian in a brown jacket as residential houses with white fences appear on the right. Finally, the environment opens into a peaceful residential area where the church recedes into the background and the sidewalk is lined with white picket fences and mature trees providing shade.
